item.title: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded: Noting that the image used in this article was taken by the author, and therefore is cc-compliant with the SCP wiki’s license (CC BY-SA 3.0).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I really like the idea of the SCP, but I feel like the article could be written much more concisely. Mirroring what PeppersGhost said before, I think the iambic part of the poems is off. Perhaps you should simply say that the responses are always "in verse." Apart from that, the lengthy descriptions of the dreams get a little tiring to read.

I voted +1 for the idea. With some tweaks it could be really interesting.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I really liked this. The poems were really well written +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The payoff of the final note is really good, but I feel like there was too much buildup on the way there. Things that induce dreams are not a new idea around here, and as much as I like the twist of the object's motivations, I'm not sure it supports an article of this length. +-0

Also, I'm not an expert on poetry by any means, so someone correct me on this if I'm wrong, but I feel like the notes are a little janky on the "iambic" part of iambic pentameter.
